concepts.finding: Temporal-contextual recommendation: incorporates time-of-day, day-of-week, season, and user temporal patterns into recommendation. Factorization model with time-specific biases and temporal interaction features. Real-time: model updates as new interactions stream in. 15-20% improvement over time-independent models.
concepts.implication: Temporal keyword intent: same keyword has different intents depending on time. "pizza" at 8pm on Friday vs 8am on Monday. Time-aware keyword embeddings: incorporate time features into keyword representation for context-dependent intent prediction.
concepts.open_question: What temporal features (hour, day, season, holiday) most strongly influence keyword intent? Can temporal patterns be used as weak labels for intent clustering?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Time-aware keyword embeddings (with hour-of-day and day-of-week features) improve intent disambiguation for time-sensitive keywords by 12%+ over time-independent embeddings.
